control.description-key: LeanToolKit embed card — shows an embedded page (a Power BI report or any https embed link) with a refresh button. The frame is created once and never reloads on resize or re-render; Power BI links can hide the filter and page-navigation panes and open on a chosen page.

property.name: embedUrl
property.description-key: The page to embed: a Power BI embed link (File, Embed report) or any https url that allows framing. Only http and https urls are loaded.

property.name: refreshTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads the embedded frame whenever this value CHANGES (e.g. Set(varRefresh, Text(Now())) after a dataset refresh completes). Note: a reload re-renders the report; for Import-mode Power BI datasets the underlying data only moves when the dataset itself refreshes.

property.name: hideFilterPane
property.description-key: Power BI links only: hides the report filter pane (filterPaneEnabled=false). Ignored for other urls.

property.name: hidePageNav
property.description-key: Power BI links only: hides the page-navigation pane (navContentPaneEnabled=false). Ignored for other urls.

property.name: pageName
property.description-key: Power BI links only: open the report on this page (the pageName / ReportSection id from the page url). Ignored for other urls.

property.name: settingsJSON
property.description-key: Consolidated configuration: {title, prompts, readOnly, theme:{background,foreground,accent,legend,font}, config:{embedUrl, hideFilterPane, hidePageNav, pageName}}. Settings are the base; a non-empty discrete text input overrides its key (boolean inputs merge with OR).

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar. Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional empty-state text shown while no Embed URL is set: plain text or a JSON array of strings.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for the refresh button hover state. Default rich black.

property.name: titleBarColor
property.description-key: Background fill for just the title bar, distinct from the card background - use one colour across related cards to visually associate them on a board. Empty = no strip fill.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for the chrome text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, hides the refresh button (display mode). The embedded page itself is unaffected.
